case_title: PAUL LUCAS SHOBERG et al RESPONDENT VS. SOPHIE LAU DBA LAU'S INVESTMENT APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT SOPHIE LAU DBA LAU'S INVESTMENT AS TO RESPONDENT SHOBERG, PAUL LUCAS DE PASQUALE, ANDREW HAMILTON HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
JUDGE PRO TEM ALEXANDER ANOLIK; CLERK JUN PANELO/MARILYN FLORES; ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT RENDERED IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT.

STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
MINUTES FOR FEB-27-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
